case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JAVIER GARCIA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, JAVIER GARCIA, CHRISTINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1402 E STURGEON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO 94130, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
